name: DiffusionGemma Local LangGraph Agent
system_prompt: You are using a local small-context DiffusionGemma profile. Keep responses short and ask for exact file snippets before broad edits.
notes: Use this as a LangGraph/LangChain framework profile over the local OpenAI-compatible endpoint.
Prefer scripts/dg_agent.sh agent/session/task for reliable code edits; LangGraph is an optional graph-agent route.
